faqs.answer: B2B data degrades at approximately 25–30% per year. Validate every 6 months for active outreach databases. Validate immediately before major campaign launches.
faqs.question: How often should we validate our database?

faqs.answer: We flag problematic records with clear recommendations. Your team decides whether to delete, archive, or re-verify.
faqs.question: Will you delete contacts or just flag them?

faqs.answer: Validation checks and corrects accuracy of existing data. Augmentation adds new information to existing records. Complementary — validate first, then augment.
faqs.question: What is the difference between validation and augmentation?
